title: Helping overseas workers to settle in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Helping overseas workers to settle in New Zealand
Find information to help your overseas workers settle into work and life in New Zealand.
- Preparing for when workers from overseas arrive Before new workers arrive from overseas, think about how you can help them settle into the workplace, and their new lives in New Zealand.

## Preparing for when workers from overseas arrive
Before new workers arrive from overseas, think about how you can help them settle into the workplace, and their new lives in New Zealand.
- Your checklist to plan ahead You can help overseas workers, and their families, prepare for their move to New Zealand by providing them with information and advice before they leave, when they arrive, and during their first few days here. Use our checklist to prepare for the arrival of new workers from overseas.

## Your checklist to plan ahead
You can help overseas workers, and their families, prepare for their move to New Zealand by providing them with information and advice before they leave, when they arrive, and during their first few days here. Use our checklist to prepare for the arrival of new workers from overseas.
- Create a welcome kit Prepare a welcome kit for new workers from overseas, providing tips and information about working and living in New Zealand.

## Create a welcome kit
Prepare a welcome kit for new workers from overseas, providing tips and information about working and living in New Zealand.
- Worker wellbeing You can support new workers in your workplace, and outside of work, by helping them feel safe and well-integrated.
You can support new workers in your workplace, and outside of work, by helping them feel safe and well-integrated.
- Video: Tips to retain migrant talent for employers Watch our video about preparing for the arrival of new workers from overseas, giving them ongoing support, and considering their points of view. Video subtitles are available in English.

## Video: Tips to retain migrant talent for employers
